tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: He developed the first commercially successful incandescent light bulb.
She won Nobel Prizes in both physics and chemistry for her research.
He set up a famous laboratory at Menlo Park, where he invented the phonograph.
She discovered the elements polonium and radium together with her husband.
He held over a thousand patents, more than almost any other American inventor.
The unit of radioactivity, the curie, was named in her honour.
He built and flew the first powered, controlled aeroplane with his brother in 1903.
He and his brother ran a bicycle shop before they turned to aviation.
He made the famous first flight at Kitty Hawk in North Carolina.
She painted the portrait known as the Mona Lisa.
He patented the first practical telephone in 1876.
He composed nine symphonies despite becoming completely deaf.
